arts.sum:
The standout match on the weekend Serie A fixture list comes from Rome on Monday when Lazio and Inter - both three points adrift of the leaders - will face off at Stadio Olimpico and 
Joe Champion has correct-score picks for all 10 Serie A matches.

arts.ttl: How move to Atalanta transformed Lookman's career
arts.sum: BBC Sport's Nedum Onuoha travels to Bergamo meet Atalanta's Ademola Lookman and discuss the impact that his move to Italy is having on his life and career.

arts.ttl: Preview: Cagliari vs. Atalanta BC - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Cagliari and Atalanta BC, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: A change in Real Madrid’s midfield pecking order was confirmed vs Atalanta
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s meeting with Atalanta on Tuesday night saw a change in the club’s midifeld pecking order all but confirmed. That’s according to Relevo, who point towards Dani Ceballos overtaking…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid confirm Mbappe injury after Atalanta exit
arts.sum: Real Madrid have confirmed that France international Kylian Mbappé suffered an injury to his thigh...
